COMMENT: This variable counts the number of months during the year that the beneficiary received their Part A 
and Part B benefits through a managed care plan (i.e., a Medicare Advantage [MA] plan) instead of the 
traditional fee-for-service (FFS) program. Any month where the HMO indicator variable 
(HMO_IND_XX) is anything other than a 0 (not a member of an HMO, and this value includes 
beneficiaries who are not Medicare enrolled for the month) or a 4 (FFS participant in a case or
